findings.evidence: `rg -n "BialgHom|→ₐc|counitBialgHom|Bialgebra\.Hom" TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Trivial.lean` has no hits; Mathlib `Bialgebra/Hom.lean` publicly imports `Bialgebra/Basic` and then defines `BialgHom`.
findings.fix: Replace it with `import Mathlib.RingTheory.Bialgebra.Basic`, which provides `Bialgebra`, `Bialgebra.comul_one`, and the algebra/coalgebra structure used here.
findings.issue: Imports `Mathlib.RingTheory.Bialgebra.Hom`, but the file does not use bundled bialgebra homomorphisms.

summary: The new trivial-comodule material is in the right comodule area, but one import is broader than what the file uses.
